title: Prashna Upanishad I: Where Do Creatures Come From?
description: From the Prashna Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Prashna Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: Reverently they approached the sage Pippalada and asked: From what is this creation born? Pippalada said: 'Prajapati, the lord of creatures, desired offspring. He performed austerities. He brought forth the pair Rayi and Prana — matter and spirit. From these all creatures came.'
